appliedSummary.notes: 6 AI preparation items (f-088, f-103, f-104, f-105, f-106, f-107) require manual configuration in Power BI Desktop UI. 3 items deferred (f-090, f-091, f-098).

changes.description: Rename ambiguous 'Name' columns to 'Customer Name' and 'Store Name' for disambiguation
changes.after: Rename Customer[Name] to 'Customer Name' and Store[Name] to 'Store Name'

changes.description: Rename ambiguous 'Country' columns to 'Customer Country' and 'Store Country'
changes.after: Rename Customer[Country] to 'Customer Country' and Store[Country] to 'Store Country'

changes.description: Rename ambiguous 'State' columns to 'Customer State' and 'Store State'
changes.after: Rename Customer[State] to 'Customer State' and Store[State] to 'Store State'

changes.description: Hide Fact - Sales[Unit Price] since fact table should be hidden; keep Product[Unit Price] visible
changes.after: Hide 'Fact - Sales'[Unit Price] from user view; keep 'Product'[Unit Price] visible

changes.description: Hide Fact - Sales[Unit Cost] since fact table should be hidden; keep Product[Unit Cost] visible
changes.after: Hide 'Fact - Sales'[Unit Cost] from user view; keep 'Product'[Unit Cost] visible

changes.description: Hide the Fact - Sales table from end users per Power BI Standards
changes.after: Set Fact - Sales table isHidden = true

changes.description: Hide surrogate key CustomerKey on Customer dimension table
changes.after: Set Customer[CustomerKey] isHidden = true

changes.description: Hide surrogate key ProductKey on Product dimension table
changes.after: Set Product[ProductKey] isHidden = true

changes.description: Hide surrogate key StoreKey on Store dimension table
changes.after: Set Store[StoreKey] isHidden = true

changes.description: Create display folders on dimension tables to organize columns logically
changes.after: Create display folders: Customer (Demographics, Geography, Identity), Date (Calendar, Fiscal), Product (Identity, Pricing, Classification), Store (Identity, Geography, Operations)

changes.description: Create display folders within the measure table to organize measures by business area
changes.after: Create display folders: Revenue, Cost, Margins within the measure table

changes.description: Add table description to Customer table for Copilot context
changes.after: Add description: 'Customer dimension table containing demographics, geography, and identity attributes for all customers. Use for filtering and grouping sales by customer attributes.'

changes.description: Add table description to Date table for Copilot context
changes.after: Add description: 'Date dimension table providing calendar hierarchy (Year, Quarter, Month, Day) and working day indicators. Primary date table for all time-based analysis.'

changes.description: Add table description to Fact - Sales table for Copilot context
changes.after: Add description: 'Sales fact table containing transactional records with order details, quantities, pricing, and cost data. Grain: one row per order line item.'

changes.description: Add table description to Product table for Copilot context
changes.after: Add description: 'Product dimension table with product attributes including name, brand, manufacturer, category hierarchy, pricing, and physical specifications (weight).'

changes.description: Add table description to Store table for Copilot context
changes.after: Add description: 'Store dimension table with location details (country, state, name), physical attributes (square meters), and operational dates (open/close date, status).'

changes.description: Add table description to the primary measure table
changes.after: Add description: 'Primary measure table for Big & Bulky Co. Contains core business KPIs including revenue, cost, margin, and sales count measures.'

changes.description: Add table description to the local measures table
changes.after: Add description: 'Local measures table for report-specific or page-level calculations. Contains measures scoped to individual report contexts.'

changes.description: Add column description for CustomerKey
changes.after: Add description: 'Surrogate key uniquely identifying each customer. Used for relationships to Fact - Sales. Not intended for end-user analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for Gender
changes.after: Add description: 'Customer gender classification. Use for demographic segmentation and filtering.'

changes.description: Add column description for Customer Name
changes.after: Add description: 'Full name of the customer. Primary identifier for customer-level analysis and lookup.'

changes.description: Add column description for Address
changes.after: Add description: 'Street address of the customer. Use for detailed location analysis or mailing purposes.'

changes.description: Add column description for City
changes.after: Add description: 'City where the customer is located. Part of the geographic hierarchy for regional analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for State Code
changes.after: Add description: 'Abbreviated state/province code for the customer location. Use State column for display; this is the short code.'

changes.description: Add column description for Customer State
changes.after: Add description: 'Full state or province name for the customer. Use for geographic grouping and filtering.'

changes.description: Add column description for Zip Code
changes.after: Add description: 'Postal or ZIP code for the customer address. Use for fine-grained geographic analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for Country Code
changes.after: Add description: 'ISO country code for the customer location. Use Country column for display; this is the short code.'

changes.description: Add column description for Customer Country
changes.after: Add description: 'Full country name where the customer resides. Use for country-level geographic grouping and filtering.'

changes.description: Add column description for Continent
changes.after: Add description: 'Continent where the customer is located. Highest level of geographic hierarchy for regional analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for Birthday
changes.after: Add description: 'Customer date of birth. Use for age-based segmentation and demographic analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for Age
changes.after: Add description: 'Customer age in years (calculated from Birthday). Use for demographic segmentation. Do not aggregate with SUM.'

changes.description: Add column description for Date
changes.after: Add description: 'Calendar date value (date-type column). Primary key of the Date table. Used for date-based relationships and filtering.'

changes.description: Add column description for Year
changes.after: Add description: 'Calendar year (e.g. 2015). Top level of date hierarchy. Do not aggregate with SUM.'

changes.description: Add column description for Year Quarter
changes.after: Add description: 'Combined year and quarter label (e.g. "Q1-2015"). Use for quarterly trend analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for Year Quarter Number
changes.after: Add description: 'Numeric sort key for Year Quarter. Used as Sort By Column for Year Quarter text field. Do not display directly.'

changes.description: Add column description for Quarter
changes.after: Add description: 'Calendar quarter label (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4). Use for quarterly grouping within a year.'

changes.description: Add column description for Year Month
changes.after: Add description: 'Combined year and full month name (e.g. "January 2015"). Use for monthly trend analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for Year Month Short
changes.after: Add description: 'Abbreviated year-month label (e.g. "Jan 2015"). Short form for compact visualizations.'

changes.description: Add column description for Year Month Number
changes.after: Add description: 'Numeric sort key for Year Month columns. Used as Sort By Column. Do not display directly.'

changes.description: Add column description for Month
changes.after: Add description: 'Full month name (e.g. "January"). Use for monthly grouping. Sorted by Month Number.'

changes.description: Add column description for Month Short
changes.after: Add description: 'Abbreviated month name (e.g. "Jan"). Use for compact monthly displays. Sorted by Month Number.'

changes.description: Add column description for Month Number
changes.after: Add description: 'Numeric month (1-12). Sort key for Month and Month Short columns. Do not aggregate with SUM.'

changes.description: Add column description for Day of Week
changes.after: Add description: 'Full day-of-week name (e.g. "Monday"). Use for day-level patterns. Sorted by Day of Week Number.'

changes.description: Add column description for Day of Week Short
changes.after: Add description: 'Abbreviated day name (e.g. "Mon"). Compact display for day-of-week analysis. Sorted by Day of Week Number.'

changes.description: Add column description for Day of Week Number
changes.after: Add description: 'Numeric day of week (1=Monday through 7=Sunday). Sort key for day-of-week text columns. Do not aggregate.'

changes.description: Add column description for Working Day
changes.after: Add description: 'Indicates whether the date is a working day (weekday). Use for business-day filtering and analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for Working Day Number
changes.after: Add description: 'Numeric indicator for working day status. Sort key for Working Day column. Do not aggregate.'

changes.description: Add column description for Order Number
changes.after: Add description: 'Unique order identifier. Degenerate dimension for order-level analysis. Do not aggregate with SUM.'

changes.description: Add column description for Line Number
changes.after: Add description: 'Order line item number within an order. Combined with Order Number forms the table grain. Do not aggregate.'

changes.description: Add column description for Order Date
changes.after: Add description: 'Date the order was placed. Primary date for sales analysis. Should be related to Date table.'

changes.description: Add column description for Delivery Date
changes.after: Add description: 'Date the order was delivered to the customer. Use with USERELATIONSHIP for delivery-based analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for CustomerKey in Fact - Sales
changes.after: Add description: 'Foreign key to Customer dimension. Links each sale to its customer. Not for direct analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for StoreKey in Fact - Sales
changes.after: Add description: 'Foreign key to Store dimension. Links each sale to the store where it occurred. Not for direct analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for ProductKey in Fact - Sales
changes.after: Add description: 'Foreign key to Product dimension. Links each sale to the product sold. Not for direct analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for Quantity
changes.after: Add description: 'Number of units sold on this line item. Use in measures (e.g. SUMX with price) rather than default aggregation.'

changes.description: Add column description for Unit Price in Fact - Sales
changes.after: Add description: 'Selling price per unit at the time of the transaction. May differ from Product list price due to discounts.'

changes.description: Add column description for Net Price
changes.after: Add description: 'Net selling price per unit after discounts and adjustments. Used for revenue calculations in DAX measures.'

changes.description: Add column description for Unit Cost in Fact - Sales
changes.after: Add description: 'Cost per unit at the time of the transaction. Used in Total Cost and margin measures.'

changes.description: Add column description for Currency Code
changes.after: Add description: 'ISO currency code for the transaction (e.g. USD, EUR). Degenerate dimension for multi-currency analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for Exchange Rate
changes.after: Add description: 'Currency exchange rate at the time of transaction. Used to convert local currency amounts to base currency.'

changes.description: Add column description for ProductKey
changes.after: Add description: 'Surrogate key uniquely identifying each product. Used for relationships to Fact - Sales. Not for end-user analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for Product Code
changes.after: Add description: 'Business identifier code for the product (SKU). Use Product Name for display; this is the internal code.'

changes.description: Add column description for Product Name
changes.after: Add description: 'Display name of the product. Primary identifier for product-level analysis and reporting.'

changes.description: Add column description for Manufacturer
changes.after: Add description: 'Name of the product manufacturer. Use for manufacturer-level grouping and analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for Brand
changes.after: Add description: 'Product brand name. Use for brand-level analysis and filtering.'

changes.description: Add column description for Color
changes.after: Add description: 'Product color attribute. Use for product attribute filtering and visual segmentation.'

changes.description: Add column description for Weight Unit Measure
changes.after: Add description: 'Unit of measure for the Weight column (e.g. lbs, kg). Interpret Weight values in context of this unit.'

changes.description: Add column description for Weight
changes.after: Add description: 'Physical weight of the product in the unit specified by Weight Unit Measure. Relevant for big & bulky logistics.'

changes.description: Add column description for Unit Cost in Product table
changes.after: Add description: 'Standard cost per unit from the product catalog. May differ from transaction-level unit cost in Fact - Sales.'

changes.description: Add column description for Unit Price in Product table
changes.after: Add description: 'List price per unit from the product catalog. May differ from transaction-level unit price in Fact - Sales.'

changes.description: Add column description for Subcategory Code
changes.after: Add description: 'Internal code for the product subcategory. Use Subcategory column for display; this is the lookup code.'

changes.description: Add column description for Subcategory
changes.after: Add description: 'Product subcategory name. Mid-level of the product hierarchy (Category > Subcategory > Product).'

changes.description: Add column description for Category Code
changes.after: Add description: 'Internal code for the product category. Use Category column for display; this is the lookup code.'

changes.description: Add column description for Category
changes.after: Add description: 'Top-level product category name. Highest level of product hierarchy for broad analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for StoreKey
changes.after: Add description: 'Surrogate key uniquely identifying each store. Used for relationships to Fact - Sales. Not for end-user analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for Store Code
changes.after: Add description: 'Business identifier code for the store. Use Store Name for display; this is the internal reference code.'

changes.description: Add column description for Store Country
changes.after: Add description: 'Country where the store is located. Use for geographic grouping of store performance.'

changes.description: Add column description for Store State
changes.after: Add description: 'State or province where the store is located. Use for regional store performance analysis.'

changes.description: Add column description for Store Name
changes.after: Add description: 'Display name of the store location. Primary identifier for store-level analysis and reporting.'

changes.description: Add column description for Square Meters
changes.after: Add description: 'Physical floor area of the store in square meters. Use for store size analysis and revenue-per-sqm calculations.'

changes.description: Add column description for Open Date
changes.after: Add description: 'Date when the store opened for business. Use for store age analysis and new store tracking.'

changes.description: Add column description for Close Date
changes.after: Add description: 'Date when the store closed (null if still open). Use with Status column to filter active vs closed stores.'

changes.description: Add column description for Status
changes.after: Add description: 'Current operational status of the store (e.g. Open, Closed). Use to filter for active stores in analysis.'

changes.description: Add measure description for Gross Margin
changes.after: Add description: 'Gross Margin = Total Revenue minus Total Cost. Measures profitability before operating expenses. Currency value (not percentage). Formula: [Total Revenue] - [Total Cost].'

changes.description: Add measure description for Total Revenue
changes.after: Add description: 'Total Revenue = sum of (Quantity * Net Price) across all sales transactions. Primary top-line monetary metric. Formula: SUMX(Fact - Sales, Quantity * Net Price).'

changes.description: Add measure description for Total Cost
changes.after: Add description: 'Total Cost = sum of (Quantity * Unit Cost) across all sales transactions. Use for cost analysis and margin calculations. Formula: SUMX(Fact - Sales, Quantity * Unit Cost).'

changes.description: Add measure description for Total Sales
changes.after: Add description: 'Total Sales = count of order line items. Measures transaction volume, not monetary value. Formula: COUNT(Fact - Sales[Order Number]).'

changes.description: Add synonyms to key business columns to improve Copilot natural language matching
changes.after: Add synonyms: Customer[Name] -> 'customer name, buyer, purchaser'; Product[Category] -> 'product category, type, group'; Store[Name] -> 'store name, location, shop'; Product[Brand] -> 'brand name, make'

changes.description: Set Data Category on geography columns for Copilot and map visual support
changes.after: Set Data Category: Customer[City] -> City, Customer[State] -> StateOrProvince, Customer[Zip Code] -> PostalCode, Customer[Country] -> Country, Customer[Continent] -> Continent; apply same to Store geography columns

changes.description: Evaluate whether Exchange Rate should use Decimal instead of Float data type
changes.reason: Needs evaluation -- Exchange Rate may be acceptable as float

changes.description: Evaluate whether Weight should use Decimal instead of Float data type
changes.reason: Needs evaluation -- Weight may be acceptable as float

changes.description: Set default summarization to 'Don't Summarize' on ID, key, code, year, and number columns
changes.after: Set SummarizeBy = None on: Year, Month Number, CustomerKey, ProductKey, StoreKey, Order Number, Line Number, Age, Store Code, Subcategory Code, Category Code, Day of Week Number, Year Quarter Number, Year Month Number, Working Day Number

changes.description: Configure Sort By Column for Date table text columns to enable chronological sorting
changes.after: Set Sort By Column: Month -> Month Number, Month Short -> Month Number, Day of Week -> Day of Week Number, Day of Week Short -> Day of Week Number, Year Month -> Year Month Number, Year Month Short -> Year Month Number, Quarter -> Year Quarter Number

changes.description: Create missing relationship between Order Date and Date table; set as active relationship
changes.after: Create relationship: Fact - Sales[Order Date] -> Date[Date] (many-to-one, active). Set existing Delivery Date relationship to inactive. Use USERELATIONSHIP for delivery date measures.

changes.description: Mark the Date table as a date table and disable auto-generated date tables
changes.after: Mark Date table as date table using Date[Date] column. Set __PBI_TimeIntelligenceEnabled = 1. Disable auto date/time in model settings.

changes.description: Fix Total Cost measure to multiply unit cost by quantity instead of just summing unit cost
changes.after: Change formula to: SUMX('Fact - Sales', 'Fact - Sales'[Unit Cost] * 'Fact - Sales'[Quantity])

changes.description: Rename 'Total Sales' to 'Order Line Count' to accurately reflect that it counts order lines, not monetary value
changes.after: Rename measure to 'Order Line Count' (or 'Transaction Count'). Formula remains COUNT('Fact - Sales'[Order Number]).

changes.description: Verify Gross Margin calculation after fixing Total Cost dependency
changes.reason: Fix Total Cost measure (f-096) first, then verify Gross Margin

changes.description: Create time intelligence measures for YTD, prior year, and year-over-year comparisons
changes.after: Create measures: YTD Revenue (TOTALYTD), Previous Year Revenue (CALCULATE + SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR), YoY Revenue Growth % ((Current - Prior) / Prior)

changes.description: Fully qualify measure references in Gross Margin formula per DAX standards
changes.after: Change formula to: '⍵ Big & Bulky Measures'[Total Revenue] - '⍵ Big & Bulky Measures'[Total Cost]

changes.description: Add additional common business measures to improve Copilot coverage
changes.after: Create measures: Average Order Value, Distinct Customer Count, Quantity Sold, Revenue per Store, Revenue per Product Category

changes.description: Rename 'Total Sales' to distinguish it from the monetary 'Total Revenue' measure
changes.after: Rename 'Total Sales' to 'Order Line Count' to clearly indicate it counts transactions, not monetary totals

changes.description: Configure AI schema (Copilot/schema.json) to control field visibility for Copilot
changes.after: Create Copilot/schema.json: hide key columns, code columns, sort-helper number columns, and intermediate fields from AI visibility

changes.description: Create AI instructions file with business context for Copilot DAX generation
changes.after: Create Copilot/Instructions/instructions.md with: (1) Big & Bulky Co business context, (2) key metric definitions, (3) default time periods, (4) business terminology, (5) preferred grouping dimensions

changes.description: Create verified answers for common business questions to improve Copilot reliability
changes.after: Create verified answers for: 'What is total revenue?', 'Show sales by product category', 'What are the top 10 customers?' -- each with 5-7 trigger phrase variations

changes.description: Enable the 'Prepped for AI' flag on the model after completing all AI preparation
changes.after: Enable 'Prepped for AI' flag in Power BI Desktop model settings

changes.description: Exclude noise fields (18 key/code/number columns) from AI schema visibility
changes.after: Exclude from AI schema: CustomerKey, ProductKey, StoreKey, Country Code, State Code, Product Code, Subcategory Code, Category Code, Store Code, Line Number, Month Number, Day of Week Number, Year Quarter Number, Year Month Number, Working Day Number, and remaining sort-helper columns

changes.description: Define Row-Level Security roles per organizational standards (minimum Admin and General)
changes.after: Create RLS roles: Admin (no filters, full access) and General (with appropriate row-level filters). Assign via AAD groups.

changes.description: Remove restrictive Q1-2015 filter on Date table to cover full sales date range
changes.after: Remove 'Filtered Rows' step (Table.SelectRows filtering to Q1-2015) from Date table Power Query. Date table should span the full range of dates across all fact tables.
